response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber (Raora Panthera) performing a dance and song, followed by a dialogue segment with another VTuber (Shirakami Fubuki). The song title is 'テトリス' (Tetris) with lyrics and music by 'マクネナナ' (Macne Nana). The song appears at 00:43 and continues until 03:11. Following the song, there is a dialogue, followed by another song 'LONELY ROLLING STAR' starting at 04:58.
